Custom Options

Retail-Ready Packaging

A child page for packaging decisions: individual packs, hangtags, barcode labels, cartons and fulfillment-friendly assortments.

Packaging Options

Individual Packing

Polybag, recycled paper wrap or paper band depending on channel needs.

Retail Identity

Hangtags, care labels, barcode stickers and assortment labels.

Carton Planning

Carton marks, mixed color assortment, SKU labels and export-ready packing.

Buyer Benefit

Cleaner receiving, easier warehouse handling and more professional shelf presentation.

Quotation Checklist

1Bag type, size and quantity
2Fabric weight or target usage
3Logo artwork and preferred print method
4Packaging and delivery target
